import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

file_path = Path("raw_data/north_slope_depth_grids/NSbasement.XYZ")

df = pd.read_fwf(
    file_path,
    skiprows=8,
    header=None
)

print(df.head())
print(df.shape)

plt.figure(figsize=(8,6))
plt.imshow(grid, cmap="viridis")
plt.colorbar(label="Depth (Z)")
plt.title("NS Basement Surface")
plt.xlabel("X")
plt.ylabel("Y")
plt.show()
In [9]:
def load_xyz_grid(file_path):
    rows = []
    
    with open(file_path, "r") as f:
        for line in f.readlines()[8:]:
            parts = line.strip().split()
            if len(parts) == 5:
                rows.append(parts)
    
    df = pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=["x", "y", "z", "lon", "lat"])
    df = df.apply(pd.to_numeric, errors="coerce").dropna()
    
    grid = df.pivot(index="y", columns="x", values="z")
    grid = grid.sort_index(ascending=False)
    
    return grid
In [10]:
base_dir = Path("raw_data/north_slope_depth_grids")

grids = {}

for file in base_dir.glob("*.XYZ"):
    print("Loading:", file.name)
    grids[file.stem] = load_xyz_grid(file)

print(grids.keys())

import numpy as np

master = grids["NSbasement"]

x_vals = master.columns.to_numpy()
y_vals = master.index.to_numpy()

X, Y = np.meshgrid(x_vals, y_vals)

print(X.shape, Y.shape, master.shape)

(208, 435) (208, 435) (208, 435)
In [13]:
def grid_to_surface_arrays(grid):
    z = grid.to_numpy()
    x = grid.columns.to_numpy()
    y = grid.index.to_numpy()
    X, Y = np.meshgrid(x, y)
    return X, Y, z
In [15]:
import plotly.graph_objects as go

fig = go.Figure()

surface_names = ["NStopo", "NSLCU", "NSshublik", "NSbasement"]

for name in surface_names:
    X, Y, Z = grid_to_surface_arrays(grids[name])
    
    fig.add_trace(go.Surface(
        x=X,
        y=Y,
        z=Z,
        name=name,
        showscale=False,
        opacity=0.75,
        hovertemplate=(
            f"<b>{name}</b><br>"
            "X: %{x}<br>"
            "Y: %{y}<br>"
            "Z: %{z}<extra></extra>"
        )
    ))

fig.update_layout(
    title="North Slope Structural Surfaces",
    scene=dict(
        xaxis_title="X",
        yaxis_title="Y",
        zaxis_title="Depth / Elevation",
    ),
    height=800,
    width=1100
)

fig.show()
In [16]:
surface_settings = {
    "NStopo": {"opacity": 0.35, "colorscale": "Greens"},
    "NSLCU": {"opacity": 0.55, "colorscale": "Blues"},
    "NSshublik": {"opacity": 0.65, "colorscale": "Cividis"},
    "NSbasement": {"opacity": 0.80, "colorscale": "Viridis"},
}

fig = go.Figure()

for name, settings in surface_settings.items():
    X, Y, Z = grid_to_surface_arrays(grids[name])
    
    fig.add_trace(go.Surface(
        x=X,
        y=Y,
        z=Z,
        name=name,
        opacity=settings["opacity"],
        colorscale=settings["colorscale"],
        showscale=False,
        hovertemplate=(
            f"<b>{name}</b><br>"
            "X: %{x}<br>"
            "Y: %{y}<br>"
            "Z: %{z}<extra></extra>"
        )
    ))

fig.update_layout(
    title="North Slope Structural Framework",
    scene=dict(
        xaxis_title="Projected X",
        yaxis_title="Projected Y",
        zaxis_title="Depth / Elevation"
    ),
    height=850,
    width=1200
)

fig.show()
In [17]:
def grid_to_long_df(grid, surface_name):
    df_long = (
        grid
        .stack()
        .reset_index()
    )
    df_long.columns = ["y", "x", "z"]
    df_long["surface"] = surface_name
    return df_long[["surface", "x", "y", "z"]]

surface_tables = []

for name in ["NStopo", "NSLCU", "NSshublik", "NSbasement"]:
    surface_tables.append(grid_to_long_df(grids[name], name))

surfaces_df = pd.concat(surface_tables, ignore_index=True)
surfaces_df.head()

thickness_maps = {
    "Topo_minus_Basement": grids["NStopo"] - grids["NSbasement"],
    "Topo_minus_LCU": grids["NStopo"] - grids["NSLCU"],
    "LCU_minus_Shublik": grids["NSLCU"] - grids["NSshublik"],
    "Shublik_minus_Basement": grids["NSshublik"] - grids["NSbasement"],
}

plt.title("Shublik to Basement Thickness")
plt.show()
In [22]:
from pyproj import Transformer

# sample row from your dataframe
sample = df.iloc[0]
print(sample[["x", "y", "lon", "lat"]])

transformer = Transformer.from_crs("EPSG:4326", "EPSG:3338", always_xy=True)

x_test, y_test = transformer.transform(sample["lon"], sample["lat"])

print("XYZ file x,y: ", sample["x"], sample["y"])
print("Transformed x,y:", x_test, y_test)
print("Difference:     ", sample["x"] - x_test, sample["y"] - y_test)

x     -6.300000e+05
y      2.000000e+06
lon   -1.686765e+02
lat    6.732879e+01
Name: 0, dtype: float64
XYZ file x,y:  -630000.0 2000000.0
Transformed x,y: -629973.259400802 1999963.7542702495
Difference:      -26.740599198034033 36.24572975048795
